buildCommand: set -eux && curl -fsSL https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/releases/download/v1.7.34/quarto-1.7.34-linux-amd64.tar.gz -o quarto.tar.gz && mkdir -p quarto-bin && tar -xzf quarto.tar.gz -C quarto-bin --strip-components=1 && quarto-bin/bin/quarto --version && quarto-bin/bin/quarto render
